sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_polygons (id UInt32, poly1 Array(Array(Float64)), poly2 Array(Array(Float64)));
SELECT id, polygonsWithinSpherical(poly1, poly2) AND (id IS NOT NULL) AS inside FROM test_polygons WHERE polygonsWithinSpherical(poly1, poly2);
SELECT id, polygonsWithinSpherical(poly1, poly2) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_polygons WHERE id = 1) > 0 AS inside FROM test_polygons;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count, polygonsWithinSpherical(ARRAY_FIRST(poly1), ARRAY_FIRST(poly2)) AND (count > 0) AS condition FROM test_polygons GROUP BY id HAVING condition;
SELECT id, polygonsWithinSpherical(poly1, poly2) AND (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM test_polygons WHERE id < 5) > 0 AS inside FROM test_polygons ORDER BY inside;
SELECT id, polygonsWithinSpherical(poly1, poly2) AS isInside FROM test_polygons WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_polygons) AND NOT(isInside) AND poly1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, polygonsWithinSpherical(poly1, poly2) AND ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_polygons WHERE poly1 IS NOT NULL) > 1) AS condition FROM test_polygons;
CREATE TABLE temp_polygons (id UInt32, poly Array(Array(Float64)));
SELECT p.id, polygonsWithinSpherical(p.poly, (SELECT poly FROM temp_polygons t WHERE t.id = 1)) AND (p.id IS NOT NULL) AS condition FROM test_polygons p WHERE condition;
